belier.intro: Friday, Venus' day, softens your natural fire and invites a gentler pace, dear Aries. The Sun in Gemini keeps animating your zone of exchanges and feeds your curiosity. The waxing Moon in Virgo settles into your zone of daily life and asks for a bit more quiet rigor.
belier.love: Today's Venus places a tender light on your bonds, and you can slow down to truly listen. In a relationship, sharing a concrete task together can deepen your connection in a quiet way. If single, an attention received at work or in an ordinary setting may take on unexpected meaning.
belier.work: Mars, your ruler, supports your efficiency, and you can get a great deal done if you channel your energy. A clear list drafted in the morning can change how you feel by the evening. Avoid trying to finish everything in one day, and choose your priorities with honesty.
belier.energy: Your head appreciates a real break away from screens, even fifteen minutes is enough. A balanced meal eaten sitting down will give you more vitality than a coffee taken standing up.
belier.intuition: Your intuition speaks today through the body and the small signs of everyday life. A detail caught from the corner of your eye may bring the answer your mind has been chasing for days.
belier.mantra: I turn my drive into useful action
belier.author: Sibylle

taureau.intro: This Friday of Venus, your ruler, wraps you in a soft and harmonious atmosphere, dear Taurus. The Sun in Gemini still lights your zone of resources and supports your patient reflection on what truly matters. The waxing Moon in Virgo in your creative zone invites a precise and concrete care for beauty.
taureau.love: Your Venusian charm gains refinement today, and you can tend to the small gestures that speak to others. In a relationship, a careful attention, a written word or a gesture prepared with care, may go straight to the heart. If single, an affinity born around a creative hobby or workshop can spark sincere interest.
taureau.work: You have the chance to move a creative project forward with almost artisanal regularity. A small detail well finished today may weigh more than ten brilliant ideas left in suspense. Avoid scattering yourself across several paths, and choose the one that resembles you most deeply.
taureau.energy: Your throat and neck appreciate a warm shower and a few gentle stretches. Preserve your pleasure of eating slowly, it is a true source of energy for you today.
taureau.intuition: Your perception sharpens through contact with a fabric, a color, a material. Let your hands speak, a simple artistic gesture may unveil a truth that words struggled to reach.
taureau.mantra: Beauty lives in my simplest gestures
taureau.author: Sibylle

gemeaux.intro: The Sun continues its course through your sign, dear Gemini, and this Friday of Venus places a tender note on your season. Mercury, your ruler, supports your quick mind with flexibility. The waxing Moon in Virgo in your home zone invites an inner as much as outer tidying.
gemeaux.love: Today's Venus softens your speech and makes you particularly charming in exchanges. In a relationship, caring for a corner of your home together can reinforce your sense of belonging. If single, a meeting in an intimate or family setting may take on a deeper flavor than expected.
gemeaux.work: You can lay solid foundations for your new solar cycle by clarifying your space and your tools. A well-written email or a tidied file today will free up hours next week. You have the chance to advance calmly rather than in your usual scattering.
gemeaux.energy: Your lungs and back appreciate a straight posture and a few deep breaths. Avoid meals taken standing while talking, your breath will benefit from slowing down a bit.
gemeaux.intuition: Your intuition loves the small details and clues left in your immediate environment today. An object, a plant, or a photo found by chance may bring a truer answer than long analysis.
gemeaux.mantra: I shape my space with gentleness
gemeaux.author: Sibylle

cancer.intro: The Sun in Gemini keeps lighting your zone of retreat, dear Cancer, and this Venusian Friday invites more inner softness. The Moon, your ruler, waxing in Virgo in your zone of exchanges nourishes a precise and kind word. Today's Venus adds a tender tone to all your close interactions.
cancer.love: Your heart looks for fitting words rather than grand speeches today. In a relationship, a calm conversation about a practical matter can soothe a recent tension. If single, you can let yourself be charmed by a subtle intelligence met in a neighborhood, a commute, or a well-crafted message.
cancer.work: You have the chance to write, email, and call with a soft, clear efficiency. An administrative task postponed for several days may be settled more easily than expected. Avoid signing a long commitment today, and keep a few hours of distance before binding yourself.
cancer.energy: Your stomach appreciates regular meals and light snacks to support your active mind. A quiet walk at the end of the day will help you digest your thoughts as much as your meals.
cancer.intuition: A phrase overheard by chance or a word crossed in a reading may resonate strangely well. Note it without judgment, it could enlighten you in the coming days.
cancer.mantra: My words place care on what I live
cancer.author: Sibylle

lion.intro: The waxing Moon leaves your sign for Virgo in your zone of resources, dear Leo. The Sun in Gemini in your zone of friendships keeps animating your circle and your collective projects. Today's Venus places a tender note on the value you give to what you do.
lion.love: Your charm takes a more discreet hue today, and this restraint is what may touch others. In a relationship, a tender gesture tied to a familiar object can rekindle an emotion you thought asleep. If single, an attention received from your circle of acquaintances may reveal a more lasting affinity than expected.
lion.work: You have the chance to review your rates, your budget, or your priorities with quiet honesty. An updated account or a tidied financial file may bring you real relief. Avoid the impulsive weekend purchase, give yourself a night of distance before any important spending.
lion.energy: Your back and heart appreciate a relaxed posture, without overloading your shoulders. A tasty and colorful meal will give you as much energy as a long nap.
lion.intuition: Your feeling today focuses on the just value of things and bonds. A sense of gratitude or discomfort around a financial exchange deserves your kind attention.
lion.mantra: What I am worth shines through my choices
lion.author: Sibylle

vierge.intro: The waxing Moon enters your sign today, dear Virgo, and amplifies your subtle presence. Mercury, your ruler, supports your clarity on this softer Venusian Friday. The Sun in Gemini in your professional zone keeps stimulating your visibility and your concrete exchanges.
vierge.love: Today's Venus invites you to drop a bit of your usual reserve to welcome what shows up. In a relationship, talking about your rhythm and your small routines can strengthen a quiet sense of complicity. If single, you may be surprised by a gaze laid upon you in a setting you frequent often.
vierge.work: You have the chance to be better noticed on a file you master perfectly. A polished presentation or a precise report may be appreciated more than you think. Avoid falling into excessive self-criticism, your work deserves your own pride too.
vierge.energy: Your belly appreciates simple food and a truly settled meal. A green walk at lunch can recharge you more than an extra coffee.
vierge.intuition: Your body is a reliable barometer today, listen to the feeling that rises before each decision. A slight tension may signal a need for pause that your schedule tries to deny.
vierge.mantra: I let myself shine without forgetting myself
vierge.author: Sibylle

balance.intro: Friday is a strong day for you, dear Libra, since Venus, your ruler, colors the whole day. The Sun in Gemini in your zone of broader horizons feeds your thirst for discovery and openness. The waxing Moon in Virgo invites a soft retreat and a finer listening to what stirs within you.
balance.love: Your Venusian charm radiates with discretion and depth today. In a relationship, sharing a reading, a film, or a travel project can nourish a wider bond. If single, a meeting in a cultural, foreign, or spiritual setting may stir a delicate emotion.
balance.work: You can advance a project in silence, polishing details without yet showing yourself. A training, a professional reading, or deeper research may bring you much today. Avoid promising too quickly to someone who asks for help, and take the time to measure your true commitment.
balance.energy: Your kidneys and lower back appreciate warmth and a flexible posture. Drink plenty of water, your inner balance depends on it especially today.
balance.intuition: An image returning in a dream or a reverie may carry a subtle message about your life direction. Welcome it without trying to interpret everything, its clarity will arrive gently.
balance.mantra: I open to what gently widens me
balance.author: Sibylle

scorpion.intro: The Sun in Gemini in your zone of shared transformations keeps its intensity, dear Scorpio. The waxing Moon in Virgo in your zone of friendships invites precise and deep exchanges. Today's Venus softens your reading of bonds and helps you receive with more flexibility.
scorpion.love: Your magnetism stays strong, but this Venusian Friday adds a warmer and tender note. In a relationship, a discussion about a shared friendship may strengthen the trust between you. If single, an affinity born in a group or activist circle may take a more intimate hue than expected.
scorpion.work: You have the chance to move a collective project forward with quiet efficiency. A clear exchange with a work partner may unlock a situation that has been weighing on you. Avoid wanting to control everything today, and leave space for the suggestions of others.
scorpion.energy: Your hips and legs appreciate a few stretches and a bit of walking. Preserve your sleep, your natural intensity needs real rest to stay just.
scorpion.intuition: Your intuition senses the unspoken in a group with great finesse today. A friendly presence may inspire a response to an intimate question you've carried for days.
scorpion.mantra: I let my friendships gently transform me
scorpion.author: Sibylle

sagittaire.intro: The Sun in Gemini in your zone of relationships keeps lighting your important exchanges, dear Sagittarius. The waxing Moon in Virgo settles into your professional zone and asks for a bit more precision today. Today's Venus places a note of gratitude on your recent journey.
sagittaire.love: Your enthusiasm channels into a finer attention to the needs of others today. In a relationship, talking about a professional project with your partner may reinforce the feeling of moving forward together. If single, an affinity born in a professional or structured setting may surprise you with its softness.
sagittaire.work: You have the chance to finalize a file with a polished quality of presentation. An initiative toward a manager or a client may be especially well received today. Avoid scattering by discussing all your projects at once, and choose the angle that resembles you most.
sagittaire.energy: Your thighs and legs appreciate some real movement, a dynamic walk would do you good. Care for your posture at work, your back will thank you this weekend.
sagittaire.intuition: Your intuition speaks to you today about your professional path and your true calling. A sign received in a work setting may guide you more accurately than long solitary reflection.
sagittaire.mantra: My drive finds its right form
sagittaire.author: Sibylle

capricorne.intro: The Sun in Gemini in your zone of daily life supports your organization, dear Capricorn. The waxing Moon in Virgo in your zone of wider horizons invites you to raise your gaze toward the future. Today's Venus places a note of pleasure on your learnings and discoveries.
capricorne.love: Your heart opens today to a dimension wider than usual. In a relationship, talking about a project of escape, study, or travel can bring breath to your bond. If single, an affinity born in a cultural, foreign, or philosophical context may take root faster than expected.
capricorne.work: You have the chance to learn something new, a reading, a training, an inspiring conversation. Saturn, your ruler, supports methodical work on a deep subject today. Avoid overloading your schedule, and keep time to truly digest what you receive.
capricorne.energy: Your knees and bones appreciate some supple movement and a good stretching time. A walk in fresh air will recharge you more than a rich meal today.
capricorne.intuition: A reading, a show, or a conference may echo a question you've carried for a long time. Note the phrases that strike you, they may light up a coming choice.
capricorne.mantra: I widen my horizon with patience
capricorne.author: Sibylle

verseau.intro: The Sun in Gemini in your creative zone keeps stimulating your inspiration, dear Aquarius. The waxing Moon in Virgo in your zone of deep bonds asks for precision in your shared commitments. Today's Venus softens your reading of intimate or financial relationships.
verseau.love: Your original charm gains warmth today without losing any of its singularity. In a relationship, talking about a concrete shared project may reinforce a deeper sense of alliance. If single, an attraction felt toward someone more discreet may reveal an unexpected facet of yourself.
verseau.work: You have the chance to review a contract, a shared budget, or a collaboration with clarity. A detail verified today may spare you many future complications. Avoid questioning a whole organization at once, and choose one precise point to clarify.
verseau.energy: Your ankles and circulation appreciate some regular movement during the day. Preserve your sleep, your creative mind needs peaceful nights to stay inspired.
verseau.intuition: Your intuition senses today what flows beneath the surface in an important relationship. A simple feeling, warmer or more tense, deserves to be noted and listened to quietly.
verseau.mantra: I weave my bonds with clarity and tenderness
verseau.author: Sibylle

poissons.intro: The Sun in Gemini in your home zone keeps warming your intimate life, dear Pisces. The waxing Moon in Virgo in your zone of relationships places you before precise and kind mirrors. Today's Venus colors your close bonds and cooperations with a tender note.
poissons.love: Your sensitivity gains clarity today without losing any depth. In a relationship, a sincere conversation about a practical need may strengthen your mutual trust. If single, a meeting in a structured setting or around a shared project may take a softer flavor than you imagined.
poissons.work: You have the chance to clarify an important collaboration with gentle lucidity. An exchange prepared in advance may defuse a misunderstanding that has lingered for days. Avoid scattering across several partnerships, and choose the one that truly matches your values.
poissons.energy: Your feet and circulation appreciate a real sitting break, without your phone. A warm bath at the end of the day may help you release what you carry for others.
poissons.intuition: Your intuition expresses itself today through the gaze of a loved one or a collaborator. A remark heard during the day may light up a zone of yourself you were starting to sense.
poissons.mantra: I meet others with clarity and softness
poissons.author: Sibylle
